text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Trainer, I'm looking forward 
to today's training.
choice_data_list: It's like you're overflowing with motivation
It's like you're overflowing with motivation

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I went to a racecourse on my outing yesterday.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
A thought popped into my 
head while I was there.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
That it's no fun to lose to someone 
you already lost to once before.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
I want to have a fun journey this time. 
Don't you want to see a scenery you've 
never seen before?

It seems that Stay Gold enjoyed 
a motivating day off.
